creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text: There is an instance of FUTEX_CMP_REQUEUE (op 132).  This operation moves sleeping threads from one umtx queue to another, possibly changing the queue keys in the process.  This is implemented by umtx_requeue(), not used by the native umtx interface in FreeBSD.  So this can certainly lead to the bug, since umtxq_sleep() does not expect the queue hash to change.
